# Quadratic equations in real life

## Short Teaching Summary
Quadratic equations in real life: Quadratic equations are used in many real-life situations like calculating projectile motion in physics or designing parabolic structures in engineering. Map connection: this idea links by example_of to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
